burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; recurrent cases drive morbidity

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: At least two of: pleuritic chest pain, pericardial rub, typical ECG changes, or pericardial effusion

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no screening; diagnosis in emergency settings

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Rapid access to ECG and echocardiography
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: NSAIDs plus colchicine; etiologic workup for recurrent cases
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: ESC guideline adherence and access to colchicine
